name: E for L Aim Public Company Limited
summary: E for L Aim Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, distributes medical devices and in Thailand and internationally. It operates in two segments, Distributor of Medical Devices and Equipment, and Beauty Treatments. The company also offers healthiness and beauty products, such as cosmetic, healthy drinks, and supplementary food products, as well as snail slime products; educational, and clinical and laboratory microscopes, as well as microscopes for biological scientific researches; and medical laboratory services. In addition, it provides franchising services. The company was formerly known as Absolute Impact Public Company Limited and changed its name to E for L Aim Public Company Limited in September 2013. E for L Aim Public Company Limited was founded in 2005 and is based in Bangkok, Thailand.
